TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-map_syulan
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: e talepawan ni buya syangatu smaqay.
S.PHON: ə tarəpawan ni βuja sjaŋatu smaqaj.
S.FORM: e talepawan ni buya syangatu smaqay.
S.PHON: ə tarəpawan ni βuja sjaŋatu smaqaj.

S.FORM: m tmita taytaanna babuy na naung.
S.PHON: m tmita tajtaanna βaβuj na nauŋ.
S.FORM: m tmita taytaanna babuy na naung.
S.PHON: m tmita tajtaanna βaβuj na nauŋ.

S.FORM: sumniz ta pawa pa tanaungan nani.
S.PHON: sumniz~r ta pawa pa tanauŋan nani.
S.FORM: sumniz ta pawa pa tanaungan nani.
S.PHON: sumniz~r ta pawa pa tanauŋan nani.

S.FORM: eh uzusa dukian ta lepawan ni utay.
S.PHON: əh uz~rusa ɮukian ta rəpawan ni utaj.
S.FORM: eh uzusa dukian ta lepawan ni utay.
S.PHON: əh uz~rusa ɮukian ta rəpawan ni utaj.

TRANSL.notes: (He spent) two hours at Utay's house.

S.FORM: yau takinilan na kawanan yau takinilan na kawanan iki.
S.PHON: jau takiniran na kawanan jau takiniran na kawanan iki.
S.FORM: yau takinilan na kawanan yau takinilan na kawanan iki.
S.PHON: jau takiniran na kawanan jau takiniran na kawanan iki.
S.TRANSL: 在右邊的旁邊有個池塘.
There was a pond on the right.

S.FORM: nani muman pasa ngayaw smaqay nani.
S.PHON: nani muman pasa ŋajaw smaqaj nani.
S.FORM: nani muman pasa ngayaw smaqay nani.
S.PHON: nani muman pasa ŋajaw smaqaj nani.

S.FORM: mlaziw tu zena pasa ngayaw smaqay nani.
S.PHON: mraz~riw tu z~rəna pasa ŋajaw smaqaj nani.
S.FORM: mlaziw tu zena pasa ngayaw smaqay nani.
S.PHON: mraz~riw tu z~rəna pasa ŋajaw smaqaj nani.
S.TRANSL: He crossed a paddy field and walked ahead,
